summary: Excellent matrix recording of a stellar show highlighted by an unforgettable Crazy Fingers and the mystically rich Blues For Allah material.
review: All three reviewers rave about this performance – they praise Jerry’s soaring vocals, Keith’s Fender‑Rhodes sparkle on Crazy Fingers, and Bobby’s inventive rhythm work. The matrix (soundboard + audience) capture is described as “very nicely recorded,” making the intricate musical moments easy to hear. No complaints are noted, so both the music and the recording come across as top‑notch.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently five‑star reviews focus on outstanding musical moments and a high‑quality matrix recording; both show and recording merit receive strong positive weighting.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers call the recording “very nicely recorded,” implying clear, balanced sound with no noted flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Not specifically described; reviewers emphasize overall greatness rather than set pacing.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Beautiful vocals highlighted as a highlight of the show.
band_member_comments.Bob: Unique, punctuated rhythm on his first Ibanez custom noted positively.
band_member_comments.Keys: Keith breaks out the Fender Rhodes on Crazy Fingers, adding a distinctive texture.
